query: ALTER TABLE living_case_state ADD COLUMN sourceTriageId VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL AFTER approvalRequiredCount; ALTER TABLE living_case_state ADD COLUMN sourceCorrelationId VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL AFTER sourceTriageId; CREATE INDEX lcs_sourceTriageId_idx ON living_case_state (sourceTriageId); CREATE INDEX lcs_sourceCorrelationId_idx ON living_case_state (sourceCorrelationId);
